name: semiconductor-trade
topic: US-China-EU trade tensions over semiconductor exports

rubrics: Facts should cover the three major blocs and keep their positions distinct.
Facts should name specific export controls, supply-chain dependencies, and retaliatory measures.
Facts should include dated developments when the sequence changes the strategic picture.
Facts should avoid collapsing the topic into generic great-power rivalry or general tech policy.
Every player entity should be a genuine actor with independent agency — name specific actors rather than generic blocs when possible.
Each player should have objectives that reflect their distinct position and incentives.
The player set should cover the key decision-makers without inflating the count with observers, commentators, or abstract forces.
